title: hieracium juranum subsp. garganum
intro: Hieracium juranum subsp. garganum, also known as the Hieracium garganicum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, with its leaves and stems used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Health benefits associated with Hieracium juranum subsp. garganum include potential anti-cancer, antiviral, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in the treatment of various diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
